values.value: Returns summary details of the current customer's own account. Takes no arguments; the customer is determined from the authenticated session.

Use this to answer questions about the customer's own account (company name, account number, industry, phone). It already returns only this customer's account — do not ask the user for their customer or account number, and never pass an identifier. If it reports the chat is not linked to a customer, tell the user their session is not linked to an account rather than trying another tool.
